_comment: Commodity tuning (§31): numbers in data, logic in Rust. The set and identity (names, recipe order) live in `economy::default_commodities`; this file supplies the hot-reloadable numbers. An entry's `name` must match a compiled commodity. Partial files are allowed (override only what you list). The committed file mirrors the compiled defaults — `data_file_matches_compiled_defaults` enforces it.
